name: tenir
description: Self-hosted recorded + stored STT sessions for Even G2 glasses, web and Android. npm-workspaces monorepo root: shared TS packages live in packages/, the Even Hub glasses client in even/, the Android client in mobile/, the React web UI in web/, the backend API (which also serves the built web UI) in api/, and the deployment stack (Docker Compose + Postgres schema) at the repo root.
